title: Techno Totem 3D
description: Makes the Totem of Undying look like Technoblade's Skin in 3D.
body:
![Big Text sayingg Techno Totem!.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1d21eada3234f20379123e7629b59d6d6522a11b.png)
#### Contents:
This Pack makes the Totem of Undying look like the popular Youtuber Technoblade.
# 
#### Having Issues?
If the Resource Pack says its not compatable with your Minecraft version, it doesn't mean it doesn't work. Try to see if the pack works, but if i still doesn't work refresh your pack or download it again and see if the new one works. But if it still doesn't work join my discord server and you can ask me there. (https://discord.gg/7tbtN7xt29)

# 

#### Dependencies 
Use the [Lower Utilities Resource Pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/lower-utilites) to make the totem of undying and other utilites like the shield, food, and fireworks look smaller.
